title: An apparatus and a method of sterilizing and drying at least one article
abstract: An apparatus (2) for sterilizing and drying at least one article comprises a container (10) configured to receive and accommodate said at least one article; at least one heater (21) configured to heat the air that is present inside the container (10) to a temperature that is in a range of 80Â°C to 100Â°C; at least one air flow generator (30) that is at least partially arranged inside the container (10), the at least one air flow generator (30) being configured to cause the air that is present inside the container (10) to circulate within the container (10); and a fluid introducing means (60) configured to increase a molecular amount inside the container (10) by introducing a fluid in the container (10).
claims:
Claims CLAIMS: 1. An apparatus (2) for sterilizing and drying at least one article (5, 6), comprising: a container (10) configured to receive and accommodate said at least one article (5, 6); - at least one heater (21 , 22) configured to heat air that is present inside the container (10) to a temperature that is in a range of 80Â°C to 100Â°C; at least one air flow generator (30) that is at least partially arranged inside the container (10), the at least one air flow generator (30) being configured to cause the air that is present inside the container (10) to circulate within the container (10); and - a fluid introducing means (60) configured to increase a molecular amount inside the container (10) by introducing a fluid in the container (10). 2. The apparatus (2) according to claim 1, comprising a controlling system (50) configured to control the at least one heater (21, 22) and the at least one air flow generator (30) for sterilizing and drying at least one article (5, 6). 3. The apparatus (2) according to claim 2, wherein the controlling system (50) is further configured to control the at least one air flow generator (30) for cooling the at least one article (5, 6) after the sterilizing and drying. 4. The apparatus (2) according to claim 3, wherein the controlling system (50) includes a temperature sensor (53), and wherein the controlling system (50) is configured to terminate the cooling action only after it is found that the temperature detected by the temperature sensor (53) is below a reference temperature. 5. The apparatus (2) according to any of claims 2-4, wherein the controlling system (50) is further configured to control the fluid introducing means (60) for increasing a molecular amount inside the container (10) during a heating-up process of the air that is present inside the container (10). 6. The apparatus (2) according to claim 5, wherein the controlling system is configured to control the fluid introducing means (60) for realizing a pulsed introduction of the fluid in the container (10). 7. The apparatus (2) according to any of claims 1-6, wherein the fluid introducing means (60) is configured to introduce at least one of a wet medium and a gas in the container (10). 8. The apparatus (2) according to any of claims 1-6, wherein the fluid introducing means (60) is provided in the form of a humidity generator that optionally comprises a small water source or water tank. 9. The apparatus (2) according to any of claims 1-8, wherein the container (10) is at least partially made of metal material, the at least one heater (21, 22) being attached to an outer surface of the metal material. 10. The apparatus (2) according to any of claims 1-9, comprising a lid (12) that is movable between a first position for closing the container (10) and a second position for allowing access to the container (10), wherein the lid (12) comprises at least one venting hole (11). 11. The apparatus (2) according to any of claims 1-10, wherein the at least one air flow generator (30) comprises a fan (31) and a motor (32) for rotating the fan (31), the fan (31) being arranged inside the container (10), and the motor (32) being arranged outside of the container (10). 12. The apparatus (2) according to claim 11 , wherein the fan (31) is arranged in a bottom area of the container (10), and wherein the motor (32) is arranged underneath the container (10). 13. A method of sterilizing and drying at least one article (5, 6) placed inside a container (10), comprising steps of: heating air that is present inside the container (10) to a temperature that is in a 

 range of 80Â°C to 100Â°C; during the heating step, circulating the air that is present inside the container (10) within the container (10); and increasing a molecular amount inside the container (10) by introducing a fluid in the container (10), during a heating-up process of the air that is present inside the container (10). 14. The method according to claim 13, wherein heating of air that is present inside the container (10) is terminated earlier than circulating said air within the container (10). 15. The method according to claim 13 or 14, wherein introducing a fluid in the container (10) is done in a pulsed fashion.
